inputs.name: secondary
inputs.description:
Indicates whether the view is secondary. It is relevant only if the view is used in `pages` slot of `ui5-user-settings-item`
and controls the visibility of the back button.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description: Defines whether the view is selected. There can be just one selected view at a time.

inputs.name: showManageAccount
inputs.description: Defines if the User Menu shows the `Manage Account` option.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Defines the title text of the user settings view.

outputs.name: ui5EditAccountsClick
outputs.description: Fired when the `Edit Accounts` button is selected.

outputs.name: ui5ManageAccountClick
outputs.description: Fired when the `Manage Account` button is selected.
